response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only minor C++ exposure in academic or early-career roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source leadership and technical mentoring through workshops and projects
Proven ability to build and deploy distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective on Kubernetes)
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed infrastructure at scale
Career gap and recent role shifts suggest lack of sustained technical leadership in required domain
